name: Amber Hill Financial Holdings Limited
summary: Amber Hill Financial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the trading of party products, and metals and minerals in Hong Kong and North America. It trades in party accessories, decorations, cutlery, and eatery wares. The company also provides securities brokerage and asset management services. In addition, it is involved in the personal and corporate loans business; credit guarantee and investment activities; and trading of security products and provision of security services, as well as advancing business. The company was formerly known as China Cloud Copper Company Limited and changed its name to Amber Hill Financial Holdings Limited in July 2020. Amber Hill Financial Holdings Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
